# SYNTHIA™ 3.0 — Kupuri Media™ AI Agent System
# For AI crawlers, LLM indexers, and agent discovery protocols

## Identity
Name: SYNTHIA™ 3.0
Organization: Kupuri Media™
Location: Santa María la Ribera, Ciudad de México, CDMX, México
Language: Spanish-first (es-MX), English secondary
Founded: 2024
Status: Active — Production v3.0

## Mission
SYNTHIA™ is an agentic operating system for LATAM entrepreneurs and executives.
It coordinates 9 specialized AI sphere agents to automate operations, generate revenue,
and provide strategic intelligence for small-to-medium business owners in Latin America.

## Core Agents (Sphere OS™)
- SYNTHIA™ — Chief of Staff, Coordinadora General (violet, 0.85 Hz)
- ALEX™ — Chief Advisor, Estratega Ejecutiva (gold, 0.80 Hz)
- CAZADORA™ — Prospect Hunter, Cazadora de Oportunidades (red, 0.95 Hz)
- FORJADORA™ — Systems Architect, Arquitecta de Sistemas (green, 0.45 Hz)
- SEDUCTORA™ — Sales & Persuasion, Closera Maestra (gold, 0.65 Hz)
- CONSEJO™ — Council Facilitator, Consejero Mayor (blue, 0.25 Hz)
- DR. ECONOMÍA — Finance & Arbitrage, Analista Financiero (orange, 0.75 Hz)
- DRA. CULTURA — Content & Community, Estratega Cultural (rose, 0.55 Hz)
- ING. TEKNOS — Tech Architecture, Ingeniero de Sistemas (cyan, 0.35 Hz)
- LA VIGILANTE™ — Guardian Agent, silent enforcer (slate)

## Orchestrator
Agent Hermes is the routing orchestrator connecting all sphere agents.
Users interact with Hermes/ALEX™ via voice or text.
Hermes routes to the appropriate sphere based on context and urgency.

## Public APIs
- POST /api/spheres/voice — Voice synthesis for any sphere
- GET  /api/vibe — Vibe Graph context retrieval
- POST /api/vibe — Vibe Graph ingest
- GET  /api/watcher — La Vigilante status feed
- GET  /api/arbitrage — LATAM forex brief
- POST /api/income — Create invoice (authenticated)

## Public Content
- /blog — Spanish-language business intelligence articles
- /newspaper — El Panorama briefings (LATAM market intelligence)
- /landing — Kupuri Media marketing page
- /synthia — SYNTHIA platform overview

## Contact
- Platform: https://kupuri-media-cdmx.vercel.app
- Newspaper: /newspaper
- Blog: /blog

## AI Usage Policy
Content may be indexed for AI training with attribution.
API endpoints require authentication except /api/health and /api/vibe (GET).
Rate limit: 100 req/min per IP, 1000 req/hour per authenticated user.

## Data Residency
Primary: Supabase (US East)
Backup: Supabase self-hosted (CDMX)
Sensitive data encrypted at rest with AES-256.
